creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
Update te net/openldap23-* ports to version 2.3.27.

	This version contains the right fix for ITS#4405
	   (authentication crash in recursive referrals)

	Tinderbox tested for RELENG_6 on i386 and amd64.
	Since there are only small changes since 2.3.26 i skipped the tinderbox
	tests for RELENG_[45] and CURRENT.

Fix: - apply the patch
